      • configureIml

        public IntellijKBean configureIml(java.util.function.Consumer<JkIml> imlConfigurator)
        Configures IML file that will be generated.

      • excludeJekaLib

        public IntellijKBean excludeJekaLib()
        In a multi-module project, a module that this one depends on might already include the Jeka dependency. This method prevents adding the Jeka dependency directly to this module.

      • replaceLibByModule

        public IntellijKBean replaceLibByModule(java.lang.String libName,
                                        java.lang.String moduleName)
        Replaces the specified library with the specified module. The library is specified by the end of its path. For example, '-foo.bar' will replace 'mylibs/core-foo.jar' by the specified module. Only the first matching lib is replaced.
        See Also:
        JkIml.Component#replaceLibByModule(String, String)

      • setModuleAttributes

        public IntellijKBean setModuleAttributes(java.lang.String moduleName,
                                         JkIml.Scope scope,
                                         java.lang.Boolean exported)
        Sets the scope and exported attribute to the specified module.
        See Also:
        JkIml.Component#setModuleAttributes(String, JkIml.Scope, Boolean)

      • setSuggestedJdk

        public IntellijKBean setSuggestedJdk(java.lang.String sdkName)
        Sets the Jdk to be referenced in the generated iml file, if none is specified by jdkName.
        Parameters:
        sdkName - The JDK name as exists in Intellij SDKs.

      • addProjectLibrary

        public IntellijKBean addProjectLibrary(java.lang.String xml)
